title: neptunia pubescens var. microcarpa
intro: Neptunia pubescens var. microcarpa is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the "sundial flower" or "microcarp sundial flower." It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Neptunia pubescens var. microcarpa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat various ailments, and its flowers can be used as a natural dye.
